name: posthog
description: Official PostHog MCP server. Query analytics, manage feature flags, create insights, run experiments, track errors.

auth.notes: The wizard will prompt for PostHog host and personal API key. Scopes required: read_project, read_insights, read_feature_flags.

setup_instructions: 1. Run the install command above. 2. When prompted, paste your PostHog personal API key (create one at https://app.posthog.com/settings/user-api-keys). 3. Verify with: claude mcp list
